text:
Nick Hibma writes:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=9249

No, I don't suffer from the problems any more. I can now mount and
access the CR-ROM drive just fine. It seems that it is fixed on
3.x-STABLE, and I use the acd driver at the moment in any case.


Regards, Ville
